/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o "VoltaResonance_artefacts/Release/VST3/VOLTA Resonance.vst3/Contents/MacOS/VOLTA Resonance" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_1.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AU_2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AUv3.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/VoltaResonance_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.mm.o"  "VoltaResonance_artefacts/Release/libVOLTA Resonance_SharedCode.a" -framework Accelerate -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreAudioKit -framework DiscRecording -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework QuartzCore -framework Cocoa -weak_framework Metal -weak_framework MetalKit -framework WebKit -flto -Wl,-weak_reference_mismatches,weak
